regions.text: The sun sends its light out in every direction.
North South East West These are four directions.
Up and down are two other directions. Up North East West South Down
This boy has six apples in his hands. He is on a branch of a tree. He will send the six apples in different directions.
He sent one apple north, another apple south, another east, and another west. He sent another apple down. He sent five apples in five directions.
